positive: A highly detailed, stylized, central composition featuring a cosmic bioluminescent forest scene. The main subject includes glowing, intricate mushrooms, ethereal flying jellyfish, and stylized mythological flora, arranged in perfect radial symmetry. The style should be a fusion of Neo-Art Deco patterns and psychedelic woodblock print, emphasizing clean silhouettes and strong, deep contrast. Use a color palette dominated by neon electric blues, deep indigo purples, glowing emerald greens, and touches of rich gold accents. The background must be a deep, velvet midnight black/indigo, making the glowing elements pop. The composition must be perfectly centered, suitable for immediate use on apparel or wall prints. Hyper-detailed, vector-art quality, flat color zones, dramatic radial lighting, ultra-high resolution, commercial graphic design.
negative: blur, noise, grainy, artifacts, low detail, watermark, text, writing, logo, trademark, readable script, blurry outlines, poor composition, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, photo, realism, photorealistic
